ogTitle: Elliott Heads vs Elphinstone: Climate Safety

heading: Elliott Heads vs Elphinstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elliott Heads, Queensland and Elphinstone, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elphinstone has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Elliott Heads (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elliott Heads or Elphinstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elliott Heads has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Elphinstone scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elliott Heads scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Elphinstone scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elliott Heads or Elphinstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elphinstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
